chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ فَاطِمَةَ ( عليها السلام ) عَقَّا عَنِ الْحَسَنِ وَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليهما السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Rasool-Allahsaww and Syeda Fatimaasws performed Aqeeqa from Al-Hassanasws and Al-Husyanasws

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/59)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/59)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْعَقِيقَةِ وَ الْحَلْقِ وَ التَّسْمِيَةِ بِأَيِّهَا يُبْدَأُ قَالَ يُصْنَعُ ذَلِكَ كُلُّهُ فِي سَاعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ يُحْلَقُ وَ يُذْبَحُ وَ يُسَمَّى ثُمَّ ذَكَرَ مَا صَنَعَتْ فَاطِمَةُ ( عليها السلام ) لِوُلْدِهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ يُوزَنُ الشَّعْرُ وَ يُتَصَدَّقُ بِوَزْنِهِ فِضَّةً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the Aqeeqa, and the shaving (of the head), and the naming, by which of these should one begin?’ Heasws said: ‘He should do all of that in one time – shaving (the head), and slaughtering, and naming’. Then heasws mentioned what Syeda Fatimaasws had done for herasws children, then said: ‘He should weigh the hair and give silver in charity by its weight’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil ibn Darraj who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the ‘Aqiqah, shaving, giving a name to the newborn and that which one should come first. He (the Imam) said, ‘All of it should be done in one hour, shaving, slaughtering the animal offered for ‘Aqiqah and naming the child.’ He (the Imam) then mentioned what Fatimah, ‘Alayha al-Salam, had done for her children. He (the Imam) then said, ‘The hairs are weighed and equal to its weight silver is given in charity.’”
